NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2010 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-22-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BENCH LETTER IS WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO RETURN AND PROVIDE 3 MONTHS WORTH OF FINANCIAL DOCUMENTATION; BANK STATEMENTS, CREDIT CARDS, PROOF OF INCOME, PROOF OF HOUSEHOLD EXPENSES, REAL PROPERTY, VEHICLES OWNED, ETC. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS GIVEN A COPY OF SC-133 TO COMPLETE AND RETURN TO COURT ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE.
